CustomField.description: Stores the description based on Item class of Product.(Source:S-692523)
CustomField.formula: CASE(Item_Class__c, "1", 'Instrument', "2", 'Major Accessories', "3", 'Consumables', "4", 'Minor Accessories', "5", 'Service', "6", 'PN/Printer', "7", 'Used', "8", 'Rental', "9", 'Other/ Intangible', "A", 'Software', "B", 'Reagent', "C", 'Lab Services', "D", 'License', "E", 'Svc Billable Labor', "F", 'Service Contract', "G", 'Service Installation', "H", 'Support, Consulating & Training', "I", 'Subscription', "L", 'Prof. Services', "Q", 'Validation', "R", 'Raw Material', "T", 'Freight', "X", 'PKI Manufactured', "Y", 'Subscription', "Z", 'Distributor', '')
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Stores the description based on Item class of Product.
CustomField.label: Description
